# Vendored libraries (P3)

Download latest stable, commit the files (no CDN at runtime — CSP `default-src 'self'`, Security §4):

- marked.min.js        https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked/marked.min.js
- purify.min.js        https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js
- jspdf.umd.min.js     https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jspdf@2/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js

Record exact versions here when vendoring.
